name: Grandma's Finest Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the sugars and shortening well.
2. Add eggs and blend until combined.
3. Mix baking soda with hot water in a separate bowl.
4. Stir the mixture of baking soda and hot water into the creamed sugar mixture.
5. Gradually add remaining ingredients (flour, salt, chocolate chips, and oatmeal) to the mixture, stirring until just combined.
6. Drop rounded teaspoons of dough onto a cookie sheet lined with parchment paper or foil.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
